The following taxes are available by default with the Luxembourgish localization package: - standard VAT
The following taxes are available by default with the Luxembourgish localization package: - reduced VAT
The following taxes are available by default with the Luxembourgish localization package: - zero-rated VAT
The following taxes are available by default with the Luxembourgish localization package: - intra-community VAT
The following taxes are available by default with the Luxembourgish localization package: - export tax
applied to most goods and services within Luxembourg
applied to some goods and services within Luxembourg
applied to goods and services not subject to VAT
applied to goods and services sold to or purchased from VAT-registered persons located in other EU countries
zero-rated tax applied to goods and services exported outside Luxembourg
Product: Odoo. The following taxes are available by default with the Luxembourgish localization package:

Product: Odoo
Title: E-invoicing
Odoo users in Luxembourg can register on the accounting/e-invoicing/peppol network
The e-invoice format in Luxembourg is **BIS Billing 3.0**.
E-invoicing via Peppol is mandatory...
...which allows exchanging e-invoices...
...and credit notes...
E-invoicing via Peppol is mandatory for all B2G transactions in Luxembourg.
companies must submit a VAT declaration
In Luxembourg, companies must submit a VAT declaration
VAT declarations can be exported as XML files
to upload on the eCDF platform
Go to Accounting --> Reporting --> Tax Report
Accounting --> Reporting
select Tax Report (LU)
Accounting --> Reporting --> Partner Ledger
Reporting --> Partner Ledger
click XML to export and download it
submit the XML file on the eCDF platform
